query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS platform_wallet (
  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  total_commissions DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  available_balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  settled_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pending_settlement DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()
);

INSERT INTO platform_wallet (id, total_commissions, available_balance, settled_amount, pending_settlement)
SELECT UUID(), 0, 0, 0, 0
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM platform_wallet LIMIT 1);

  id VARCHAR(36) PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT (UUID()),
  total_commissions DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  available_balance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  settled_amount DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  pending_settlement DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE NOW()

WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM platform_wallet LIMIT 1);
